scope: private-beta runtime health and durable progress parity implementation evidence

browserVerification.console: Next.js development and HMR notices only

visualEvidence.alt: Desktop ReproForge case page showing the tenant-scoped identity boundary while Auth0 is not configured.
Mobile ReproForge case page showing the tenant-scoped identity boundary without horizontal overflow.
Desktop ReproForge ChatGPT widget preview showing verified proof, evidence, runs, and bundle state.
Mobile ReproForge ChatGPT widget preview showing verified proof without horizontal overflow.

redGreenFindings.red: Hosted runner health always returned RUNNER_NOT_CONFIGURED even though isolated execution was composed.
redGreenFindings.green: A bounded real Node 24 sandbox probe now proves deny-all execution, validates a marker, stops the sandbox, and exposes only stable health codes.

redGreenFindings.red: A hosted preview could report durable providers ready while Auth0, OAuth resource, or GitHub App configuration was absent.
redGreenFindings.green: Hosted readiness now validates all product configuration and canonical origins before any provider probe runs.

redGreenFindings.red: REST, MCP, widget, and web surfaces had independent or implicit progress representations.
redGreenFindings.green: All four surfaces now consume one strict durable progress projection, covered by 500 generated schedules and an executable BDD journey.

deferred: live Auth0 tenant and OAuth linking
live GitHub App installation and repository selection
sanitization: Evidence contains only the trusted synthetic fixture and a synthetic inaccessible case identifier; no credentials, sessions, private repository names, customer data, or provider resource identifiers are committed.
